headline: Intercontinental Exchange OKX Deal Extends Crypto Reach And Raises Valuation Questions
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) has taken an equity stake in global crypto exchange OKX and agreed to a broad partnership focused on digital assets and tokenized securities. The deal includes a board seat for ICE, data and technology integration, and plans to develop regulated crypto futures and tokenized equity products. The move links ICE’s regulated market infrastructure with OKX’s global crypto user base, with the aim of connecting traditional markets with blockchain based...
